commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation run mdl-check-160 --rm -i --restart=Never --image=busybox:1.36 --overrides="{\"spec\":{\"nodeSelector\":{\"kubernetes.io/hostname\":\"ip-10-1-12-160.us-east-2.compute.internal\"},\"tolerations\":[{\"key\":\"nvidia.com/gpu\",\"operator\":\"Equal\",\"value\":\"true\",\"effect\":\"NoSchedule\"}],\"containers\":[{\"name\":\"x\",\"image\":\"busybox:1.36\",\"command\":[\"sh\",\"-c\",\"ls /m/current 2>&1; du -sh /m/current 2>/dev/null\"],\"volumeMounts\":[{\"name\":\"m\",\"mountPath\":\"/m\"}]}],\"volumes\":[{\"name\":\"m\",\"hostPath\":{\"path\":\"/var/lib/yanxi-models\"}}]}}" 2>&1 | tail -10'
